ddls:
CREATE TABLE "investors" (
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investor */,
  "investor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the investor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the investor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the investor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the investor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the investor account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the investor account was last updated */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax ID of the investor */,
  "investment_goal" TEXT /* Investment goal of the investor */,
  "risk_tolerance" TEXT /* Risk tolerance of the investor (e.g., conservative, moderate, aggressive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investor who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_type" TEXT /* Type of the portfolio (e.g., stocks, bonds, mutual funds) */,
  "portfolio_status" TEXT /* Status of the portfolio (e.g., active, inactive, pending) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio was last updated */,
  "management_fee" REAL /* Management fee for the portfolio */,
  "minimum_investment" REAL /* Minimum investment required for the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_holdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio that owns the holding */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security being held */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of shares or units of the security */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the security was purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the security was purchased */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the holding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security */,
  "security_name" TEXT /* Name of the security */,
  "security_type" TEXT /* Type of security (e.g., stock, bond, ETF) */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the security */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange on which the security is traded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the security was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the security was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio being tracked */,
  "period" TEXT /* Time period for the performance data (e.g., Week 30, Month 1) */,
  "suba" REAL /* Suba value (a financial metric) */,
  "redb" REAL /* Redb value (a financial metric) */,
  "values_of_investor_shares" REAL /* Number of shares held by the investor */,
  "delta1" REAL /* Delta1 value (change in value over a specific time interval) */,
  "delta2" REAL /* Delta2 value (change in value over another time interval) */,
  "recorded_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance data was recorded */,
  "benchmark_return" REAL /* Benchmark return for the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_performance_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio associated with the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., buy, sell, dividend) */,
  "transaction_amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was recorded */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the transaction */,
  "taxes" REAL /* Taxes associated with the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, admin, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view portfolio) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio being audited */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being audited */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, insert, delete) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the change occurred */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)
